# UrbanBreathe
> AI-powered Smart City Air Quality Decision Intelligence Platform for government command centres, municipal corporations, and pollution control boards. Built for ET AI Hackathon 2.0.

## Core Modules

- [Live Monitoring](https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app): Real-time AQI dashboard with PM2.5, PM10, NO₂, O₃, SO₂, CO, weather conditions, interactive AQI gauge, and anomaly detection.
- [Source Attribution](https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app): Explainable AI engine estimating pollution source contributions (traffic, industry, biomass, dust) with confidence scores.
- [Predictive Intelligence](https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app): 72-hour AQI forecast using diurnal cycle modeling with confidence scoring and hourly breakdown.
- [Policy Simulator](https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app): Test 8 policy interventions with before/after comparison on AQI, PM2.5, hospital admissions, and cost.
- [Executive Brief](https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app): One-click government-ready situational report with print/PDF export.
- [Citizen Advisory](https://urban-breathe-nine.vercel.app): Multilingual health advisories (English, Hindi, Bengali, Telugu) with precautions and emergency contacts.

## API Endpoints

All endpoints served at `/api/` (proxy to Express backend):

- `GET /api/cities` – List all monitored cities
- `GET /api/air-quality/:cityId?lat=&lon=` – Live AQI and weather data
- `GET /api/sources/:cityId` – AI source attribution
- `GET /api/forecast/:cityId` – 72-hour forecast
- `GET /api/simulation/interventions` – Available policy interventions
- `POST /api/simulation/run` – Run policy simulation
- `POST /api/brief/generate` – Generate executive brief
- `GET /api/advisory/:cityId` – Citizen health advisory

## Data

- **Data Source**: Open-Meteo API (free, no key required) with curated fallback dataset
- **Cities**: Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Kolkata, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Lucknow, Ahmedabad, Patna
- **Tech Stack**: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS 3.4, Express.js
